I was in a horrific car accident on my way to a client. I was T-boned and I found my self tipped over looking at the pavement. The next thing I remember firemen were talking to me through the sun roof and I ended up in the emergency room. My back, neck and hands were a mess. As much as I tried to do things on my own, it proved to difficult and I realized I had to find myself a workers compensation attorney. That's when a friend referred me to Oktanyan Der -Grigorian Law Group. I worked directly with Julie and she was so resourceful and amazing. She sent me to greatdoctors and physical therapy. All medication was paid for. In the end we achieved a great result through her tireless work and her communication with me. Our case is now settled and I am so happy to get back to real life again in these crazy Covid times. I highly recommend Julie and her staff, especially Tina, for everything they did on my case. I highly recommend them to anyone who has suffered a traumatic work injury and needs a  serious firm who cares behind them.

Julie and the staff at this firm knows what to do when it comes to Workers Comp cases. I have recommended a few of my friends and family to her and they were very happy! They are experienced, knowledgeable and friendly! High Recommended!

My car that I still owed $20,000 on was totaled by a driver with no insurance, I was diagnosed with a concussion and muscle spasms, and I woke the next day with some of the worst pain I have ever felt ripping through my back and neck. All this and more threw my life into complete chaos. I didn't know what to do, I didn't know who to talk to or trust, and I didn't know if this all just meant my life was just this much harder now. At first, I tried to work with one of the larger firms in Los Angeles. They assigned me a "Case Manager" and wouldn't even let me speak to the lawyer that was supposedly representing me. I felt like a product, like a part of their bottom line. So, I started looking elsewhere. I made contact with Aramayo And Ho just to ask for their advice on the situation. In a single phone call they made me feel more informed, more secure, and more cared for than my original firm had in weeks. I immediately switched over from the larger and faceless firm to Aramayo And Ho. Six months later and I have received the medical care I needed, my car that was totaled was fully paid off, and I am about to receive my deserved compensation from my Insurance. Aramyo And Ho were with me every step of the way and were just a phone call away whenever I had questions or concerns. I can not sing their praises highly enough. For your sake, I hope you never are in a situation like mine, but even more I hope that if you ever are that you choose to be represented by this firm. Thank you again Victor for all you did for me

I opted to go with a larger firm with more (employees) — an option I regretted shortly after. The other major firm may have had more ‘man power,’ but I was left in the dark. I couldn't get in contact with my attorney when needed, and they frequently asked me to complete unnessary tasks. When I needed assistance changing medical providers, I wasn't able to contact my lawyers to transfer billing. Eventually, I felt stuck. I remembered the feeling I had after my phone call with Victor, and I wanted that comfort and sense of agency back. I needed a lawyer who I could rely on to support my needs. I reached out to Victor Ho, who transferred my case to his partner, Charles Aramayo. Charles did an incredible keeping me informed throughout the case, and worked with my medical providers. Even my chiropractor noted that speaking with Charles was refreshing, and he enjoyed how thorough and responsive Charles is! In regard to the case, Charles did his due diligence to protect me and supported me every step of the way. When my word and photo supports weren’t enough evidence for my statements, Charles did his own research, which confirmed that skid marks on the road didn't come from my car. He proved they were present years before my accident took place. I appreciate all of the efforts Charles and Victor went through working with me, not to mention the fantastic settlement they got me!
I now recommend them to anyone who needs a personal injury lawyer. reviews.text:
Update: Thank you for the response. I want to clarify that my review was not about questioning the firm’s right to decline my case or whether the internal process for triage at this firm was followed correctly. My disappointment was not with the decision to decline representation, but with how unexpectedly it came after what felt like an open and engaged intake process.

I provided all of the documentation I had, stayed engaged during the follow-up calls with the legal assistant, and then, without any indication of how the review was going, received a non-representation letter. That felt abrupt.

What I hoped for—and what I still believe is reasonable—was  insight into where my case stood before receiving the non-representation letter. A little transparency would have gone a long way because this particular internal process felt opaque from the (potential) client side. There was no clarity on what was happening behind the scenes, and no feedback loop until the final decision.

The process doesn’t need to be “glamorous”. However based on the firm’s other reviews, where people spoke highly of the empathy and transparency they experienced, I expected a more human-centered approach. My experience was a genuine disconnect from this and I felt it was important to share.

There are an abundance of employment law firms/offices in this area, and I chose to contact this one. I have no doubt this firm does important work and will continue to, but in this situation, you all missed the mark. That deserves to be acknowledged, not explained away as just “the process”.

---------------
I appreciated how quickly I was contacted for an intake interview and how the team stayed in touch throughout the process. I didn’t get the chance to speak directly with the attorney, which I had hoped for since my main reason for making contact was to understand what they specifically look for in the type of claim I wanted to pursue.

I recognize that there’s a process to all of this and you can’t expect to speak with the attorney right away, and I respected that. I provided a lot of background information early on in hopes of giving them enough context so that, when there was a chance to speak, the attorney would have what they needed to answer my questions meaningfully. Legal issues like this are difficult to navigate when you don’t have the expertise or knowledge of resources, and that’s why I was seeking their professional opinion.

While I wasn’t entirely happy with how Luis handled our last correspondence, my overall experience with the office wasn’t negative in any way (may be a bit lackluster in the end). More than anything, I was interested in hearing the attorney’s perspective and I just wish there had been an opportunity to get clearer feedback from them about my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are proud to be one of California's most trusted employment law firms.  Our reputation is built on meaningful results for our clients.  Every potential new client is treated with the utmost professionalism, respect, and empathy.  Our intake team is trained to collect all relevant information and present it to the lawyers.  The lawyers review the files of every potential new client, so all potential clients receive free evaluations of their cases by a lawyer.  After review, a lawyer determines whether there is a viable case to pursue.  If not, the potential client is provided with a notice of non-representation.  Follow-up phone calls with lawyers take place only when there is a more in-depth analysis needed to evaluate your case, or when we have determined that we can offer you our services.  In your case, all this was done correctly and we provided you with a notice of nonrepresentation, along with suggestions on what to do next and deadlines to keep in mind.  We understand that it can be disappointing, but we provide our legal opinion only after a thorough analysis by a lawyer.  There is nothing glamorous about the process, and it is not realistic to expect to speak with a lawyer during the initial free evaluation of a potential case that would be retained on a contingency fee basis

reviews.text:
5 stars just isn't enough! From the very beginning of my case to its conclusion, I have had a wonderful experience with my team at Razavi Law Group(RLG). Due to my past experiences with different law firms for different reasons, my hopes and expectations were low when I sought to retain counsel for my eggshell claim. After retaining RLG I just thought to myself, "here we go again". Boy, was I proven so wrong by them.
From the moment I signed, they got to work for me. I was being called daily to see how I was feeling. They even assisted with communicating with adjusters to expedite my auto repairs.
One of the worst things I disliked about other law firms is that it is impossible to talk to your attorney after you sign your retainer. They are either in "trial", in a meeting, or just take weeks to return your call or email. Not at RLG. In fact, my attorney Tim Hunt who is absolutely amazing, was always the one calling me to keep me update. I know he genuinely cared about me and my situation instead of just pretending to like other attorneys in my past. Tim was always looking out for my best interest and always cared about how me and my family were holding up. He setup a game plan from the moment he took my case and followed it all the way through to the end which resulted in maximum compensation.
Then there's Christina, bless her so much. She was there with me the whole way through. From setting up appointments, gathering records, speaking to many people on my behalf, and randomly calling to see how I was doing, she was hard at work for me. She is truly a gem and a foundational strength to RLG. Her Hard work is very much appreciated and treasured.
I just feel as though I cannot say enough good things about this firm and the people who represent it. This is pinnacle of customer service and professionalism and their care for their clients is exemplary.
Thank you to attorney Tim Hunt, Christina,  and everyone over at Razavi Law Group for the excellent care and representation. I hope to never need these services again in the future. However, if I do, there is no other firm I'd want having my back because as I stated in the beginning, 5 stars just isn't enough.  Thanks again friends.

Finding a lawyer that represents landlords was quite a challenge for me in the city of Los Angeles, because most of the lawyers I would reach out to, only represented tenants. Finding attorney Jual Reyes was such a blessing because not only was he willing to represent me (landlord), but he had the experience with the entire process regarding Los Angeles Housing Department and laws behind the Rent Stabilization Ordinance (RSO) in the city of Los Angeles. In addition to this, LADBS was involved, and he would make sure to take on all forms of communication with the inspector. Throughout the process the only thing I did was sign paperwork electronically.
In the city of Los Angeles laws are being created to protect tenants and not landlords, and this plays a big part in being able to find a good lawyer that is willing to represent you (landlord). I 100% recommend attorney Jual Reyes to landlords who need legal assistance.

reviews.text: Excellent lawyers, I highly recommend them because they are very responsible and very helpful. I am very grateful for all their help. They were excellent, thank you so much!
reviews.ownerResponse: Rosario, we're delighted to know we met your expectations. Our goal at our office is to provide the best possible service. Thank you for taking the time to leave your recommendation and for the 5-star rating!

reviews.text: I was in a car accident last year and things have finally settled.  I was rear ended, two cars were involved and both were fighting over who's fault it was. This was becoming complicated and it became clear I needed help. I was referred to Armen's office through my doctor that I went to go see after my accident.  Armen himself got on the phone and explained the process and answer any questions I had.  I was able to get treatment for my injuries, get my car fixed and compensated for my pain and suffering.  Thank you Armen and Erick for all your hard work and keeping me up to date through out the process. So thankful to have someone work through this mess with me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Mango Soyjoy, thank you for taking the time to leave us your positive review and for the 5 stars in your comment!!! It is our goal to provide the best service possible to our client. We re happy to see that we meet your expectations.

reviews.text: Armen has been exceptional in the year+ it took for my case to wrap up. He goes above and beyond to ensure that everything goes smoothly and is extremely communicative! Very grateful to have found this business. Definitely reccomend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Kat Elizabeth, thank you so much for your positive comment and your recommendation.

reviews.text: I was sold a car by a “reputable” dealership that had provided false warranty documents as part of the sale. Margarine Law Group was the only attorney to accept my case. The service they provided was exceptional and they were able to get a settlement from the dealer for repairs that should have been covered under the warranty I was supposed to have. Bella at the firm gets a special shoutout for her great personal service.
I had a great experience with the lemon law process for my car through The Margarian Law Firm. They made everything easy and stress-free. I would definitely use them again.

I was referred to Margarian Law by family, and I’m very grateful for that recommendation. My experience with the firm handling my lemon case was excellent from start to finish. The process was smooth, professional, and completely stress-free on my end. I never had to follow up or chase updates, which gave me great confidence in how my case was managed.

Maria, my case manager, is exceptional! She is knowledgeable, organized, and consistently professional, while also being genuinely helpful and reassuring throughout the process. She made sure everything was clear and handled efficiently.

Communication was also incredibly convenient. The ability to respond via text when I was unavailable for calls made a significant difference, and all interactions were prompt and courteous.

Even after my case settled, Maria continued to follow up and guide me through the next steps to ensure I received my additional reimbursements. That level of care and professionalism truly stands out.

I highly recommend Margarian Law to anyone dealing with a lemon vehicle. Their professionalism and client-focused approach made this a very positive experience.

Cannot say enough good about Margaryan law and especially Bella. Two other law farms refused my case yet Bella and her team instantly knew it was an easy case and within their exact specified timeline, my car has been surrendered and my headache is over. They were extremely punctual and easy to talk to and ask any questions or concerns I had. I am extremely grateful for the recommendation I got from my family friend about them because this entire process went from being a headache with a car I couldn't wait to get rid of to just waiting for the emails and letting my car and headache be taken away.

I had such a wonderful experience with Sona. So helpful, so beyond knowledgeable, very patient, very kind- she deserves a raise for going above and beyond. This level of professionalism and human decency is a reflection of her as a person as well as the law firm itself. I highly recommend working with this firm. And again I highly recommend Sona get a raise. Thank you

I had an absolutely fantastic experience with the Margarian Lemon Law team. Sona, Bella and Hovanes Margarian himself went above and beyond—super smooth handling, total pros from start to finish. My defective electric vehicle case? Handled flawlessly, I'm beyond satisfied. Whatever sneaky competitors left those bad reviews, ignore them; these folks deserve the Lemon Law King crown hands down. Best in the business—I'll tell all my friends to call you right away. Keep up the incredible work!

Amazing experience with Margarian Law Firm! From start to finish, they were very responsive, professional, and easy to work with. I had an issue with my car, and they took care of everything and successfully resolved my case with a great outcome. I’m so grateful for their help and highly recommend them.
They weren't the lawyer i was looking for but i give them 5 stars for their professional welcoming.

We just got over $33k back from our Tesla Model X lease. There were constant safety issues that impacted family and put us at risk. We were going to be happy just to get out of the lease and not be stuck with it anymore, but everyone at Margarian went above and beyond. They were always honest and transparent.

Thanks guys!!! You helped us out a ton and made the process very easy.

Very responding and caring team. While other firms didn’t want to take my case they took it with all the risks and got me through it. Special thanks to Bella, who explained me all the steps and answered all the questions I’ve had. They surely know their job. Thanks again!!
Hovanes and team are very professional, thorough, and efficient. Really happy with the way they took care of us. Highly recommend !!!

I had an excellent experience working with Bella Hovhannisyan, Case Manager at The Margarian Law Firm. Bella was absolutely amazing — very professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly responsive. She handled my case with great attention to detail and made everything move smoothly and efficiently. Her communication was fast and clear, and she always went above and beyond to make sure I was informed and comfortable throughout the process. I truly appreciate her dedication and outstanding service. Highly recommend Bella and The Margarian Law Firm!

The Margarian Law Firm exceeded every expectation I had. From start to finish, their entire team was incredibly responsive, professional, and easy to work with. Any time I had a question, someone was quick to get back to me and make sure I fully understood where things stood.
Hovanes Margarian is the kind of attorney you want on your side — sharp, aggressive when needed, and fully committed to getting you the best possible outcome. He fought hard on my case and made sure I got every dollar I was entitled to for my car. You can tell he genuinely cares about his clients and takes pride in delivering results.
The whole team operates like a well-oiled machine — organized, knowledgeable, and always willing to help in any way they can. I never felt like just another client; they treated me with respect and kept me updated every step of the way.
If you’re dealing with a Lemon Law issue or any legal matter, this is the team you want representing you. The Margarian Law Firm truly sets the bar high.

I hired this law firm to handle a lemon law case for me, and I would not recommend them. When I first signed, the fee arrangement was not explained clearly. Later I discovered a hidden 50% fee that was never made transparent up front. On top of that, instead of trying to resolve my case quickly, my lawyer is dragging it out to trial, which is being done to increase THEIR payout rather than serve my best interests. They are not handling my case honestly, and are essentially taking advantage of people all around. If you consider working with them, please read all your paperwork carefully. And just so it’s clear, I’m a client even though they will try and say I’m not since we’ve had disagreements. Thank you for your attention.

I had never gone through a lemon law case before, but I was referred to Margarian Law Firm and decided to give it a shot. From start to finish, their professionalism, attention to detail, and depth of knowledge were outstanding. The team was incredibly prompt and thorough, making the entire process smooth and stress-free. Ani, the case manager handling my file, was exceptional—she kept me informed every step of the way and made sure everything was easy to understand. She answered all my questions no matter what it was and always had a positive attitude throughout the whole time. I highly recommend Margarian Law Firm to anyone in need of their services.

Thank you very much, I truly appreciate your professionalism, It was a real pleasure working with you, and I’m pleased with the service and care you provided. I highly recommend Margaryan Law to anyone looking for quality and reliability

Thank you to The Margarian Law Firm and Bella for handling my Lemon Law case with ease and efficiency. Their team is incredibly experienced, knowledgeable, and a pleasure to work with. I had seamless communication, and my questions were addressed promptly without any issues. I highly recommend this firm to anyone navigating a similar situation.
One of the best law firms I have ever worked with.

I want to extend my deepest gratitude to Margaryan Law Firm for being absolutely amazing! I’m so impressed by how professional, knowledgeable, and on top of everything the entire team is. They turned a complicated process into something so much easier and less stressful.
I truly appreciate how supportive and caring they’ve been throughout — it means so much to have such a reliable team backing me up.
Thank you for everything you do — you guys are the best!

NISSAN FRONTIER
My case was successful and I am very thankful.  Got the job done in the end, but customer service needs to be worked on. If you’re VERY patient and don’t mind following up a lot, they will eventually come through.

This could be the worse and un professional law firm. Half people don't know what's going on. Don't waste your time .  Came here for lemon law and after week they said can't do it. Just waste time and poor call.
Huge thanks to Margarian Law Firm for handling my lemon law case so smoothly. Special shoutout to Bella—super professional and always kept me informed. Great experience overall!
Margaryan Law firm is great! Got my claim with Mercedes approved and I am now just waiting on  them to finish the process. Thank you!

I had an exceptional experience with the Margarian Law Firm. From the very beginning, their team was incredible, diligent, and highly professional. They took the time to carefully explain each step of the legal process and kept me consistently updated throughout my case, which gave me a great sense of confidence and peace of mind.

Their meticulous attention to detail and strong work ethic were evident in everything they did. I truly felt like they cared about my case and were committed to achieving the best possible outcome.

If you're looking for a law firm that combines expertise, dedication, and clear communication, I highly recommend the Margarian Law Firm. They exceeded my expectations and delivered results.

Special thanks to Ani Kachadurian for her exceptional professionalism.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5 Stars all around.

If you’re dealing with a problematic car and need a powerhouse legal team, look no further than Margarian Law Firm. I had two lemon cases—a 2021 Range Rover Sport and a 2023 Tesla Model X—and they handled both with absolute precision and professionalism.

For my Range Rover case, I had the pleasure of working with Maria Ayvazyan, who was an absolute rockstar throughout the entire process. From day one, she was on top of everything, super organized, and always responded to emails quickly. She kept me informed every step of the way, making the entire experience smooth and stress-free. Maria is a true professional who genuinely cares about her clients, and I couldn’t have asked for a better case manager.

For my Tesla case, Ani Khachadurian took the lead, and she was equally impressive. Ani is detail-oriented, responsive, and always one step ahead. She made sure all my concerns were addressed, kept me updated throughout the process, and handled everything with confidence and expertise. Dealing with a company like Tesla requires someone who knows how to navigate the system, and Ani did that flawlessly.

I also want to take a moment to thank everyone else at Margarian Law Firm who worked behind the scenes on my case. I know it takes a full team to make everything run smoothly, and I truly appreciate the hard work and dedication from everyone involved. Your efforts did not go unnoticed, and I am grateful for the time and energy put into my cases.

Margarian Law Firm stands out for their top-notch communication, expert legal knowledge, and hassle-free process. There was no waiting around for responses—they were always on it. Their team knows exactly how to fight for their clients, ensuring the best possible outcome. Both of my cases were handled with care, professionalism, and efficiency, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. If you have a lemon law case, don’t waste your time elsewhere. Margarian Law Firm is the way to go.

One of the best law firms I have ever worked with! I was referred to them due to me wanting to lemon my Tesla and they immediately agreed to take my case. Ani was very responsive and kept providing updates through the entire process. The lemon law successfully went through in a very short time period. Overall, 10/10. I would recommend this law group each and every time.
What can I say. The best in the the business. The team is great and knowledgeable. Everything went so smooth that I didn’t have to do anything except to wait for my settlement check.
Very helpful and professional
amazing service followed up highly recommended thank you .

Magarian Law Firm did an excellent job from start to finish with my lemon law case!! I am more than pleased with my settlement!! Very professional, very honest and hardworking, always putting my needs and wants first!! I highly recommend!!  Thank you Margarian Law Firm!!
Mr. Margiarian and his team was very helpful with my Lemon buyback for Mercedes EQS. My case mamager Ani was very helpful and knowledgeable. I highly recommend them for lemon law cases.
Very professional team. You can’t go wrong with them. Thank you!

The Margarian Law Firm provided exceptional service from beginning to end. Their staff (Specifically Nora and Maria) were thorough and always readily available to answer questions or concerns. I had a Range Rover Velar and received a settlement.

guys, 100% professionals.  organization of business processes at the highest level

I highly recommend this law firm due to their expertise, professionalism, outstanding communication, and the fantastic results they delivered! My family’s experience with this firm was smooth and the resolution exceeded our expectations.

Great service. Thank you for all your help.
This is by far the best law firm iv dealt with they are very good at what they do and they are also very friendly to there clients,  very professional margarian law firm #1

This is the law firm to go with! I had some serious issues with my car when I failed them up not knowing what to do next. From that point on I did not have to worry about anything. I only got regular and accurate updates on the status till I received full refund for the full value of the car! Fair and square! Special thanks to Nora who handled the intake and Maria who communicated with me down the road. Great job! Thank you all.

I am a returning client at “Margarian Law Firm” they never disappoint me!  They did their due diligence in making sure that I had the support I need. I am extremely satisfied with the legal services provided. The lawyers executed their work with precision and timely delivery. I highly recommend their services.
I would also like to commend the outstanding support from a staff member named Any. Her professionalism and dedication greatly contributed to my positive experience with the legal team. Overall, I am genuinely pleased with their excellent service.

I had the pleasure to work with Ani K & Nora. They made the process so easy and was able to get my whole full amount back. I am super satisfied by the way they decided to handle business. Will definitely always use Margarian Law Firm for my car lemon needs.
Nora help us with us with our case, she is great to deal with and punctual. Highly recommend !
Great service...Armine & Anna made it easy...They were on Point...Keep it going.

I am a returning client of Margarian Law Firm, and they never disappoint me! The whole experience is super smooth, and their communication is top-notch. These guys really know their stuff! They've been around for ages, and their attorneys are experts in Lemon Law and Dealer Fraud.

What I love most about Margarian Law is how much they care about their clients. They have your back and will go above and beyond to get you the compensation you deserve. If you need legal help related to your defective vehicle, I can't recommend them enough! Trust me; you won't be disappointed! 😊👍

I found myself in need of legal assistance when my Tesla broke down after only a month. After doing a lot research, I reached out to Margarian Law Firm for my Lemon case, and I can confidently say, it was one of the best decisions I made. I actually reached out to many law firms which seemed to be unprofessional, but the staff at Margarian stood out to me. Honestly, their exceptional service was evident. The staff promptly addressed my concerns, effectively guiding me through the process, demonstrating not just professionalism, but a high degree of legal expertise. Moreover, their transparency throughout the journey was truly commendable. Transparency is the most important factor during a case like this and I didn’t want to feel left out. They ensured that I was up-to-date with all the developments, patiently answered my questions, and explained all the legal stuff that was unfamiliar to me. Also, their relentless negotiation skills and thorough understanding of the law yielded a result far better than I had anticipated, which speaks volumes about their commitment to their clients. They were also very open and honest about what was expected and told me about the problems they might run into from day one. In retrospect, the whole experience was not just about resolving the issue at hand, but it was also a journey that reinstated my faith in the justice system. Let’s be honest, dealing with lawyers isn’t fun or easy. The fact that my Tesla was having so many issues was already stressful, expensive and a headache. So having someone to advocate on my behalf and fight for my rights without also causing problems was incredible. In light of my exceptional experience, I would unreservedly recommend Margarian Law Firm to anyone seeking proficient and dedicated legal services. They don't just promise results, they deliver them, always prioritizing the client's needs. I started the process super upset and angry at Tesla because they basically scammed me out of 75K, but left the experience feeling empowered and happy because of Margarian. I would recommend them to everyone.

P.S. I got an amazing settlement in a very timely manner when two other law firms told me that I may not have a case at all.
Edward has been ignoring me for months now these people are stealing $60,000 and withholding more than half my funds absolutely unbelievable and unacceptable!!!!!
Justice and Ben are great attorneys who helped resolve my case and get money in my pocket. They work hard and I can tell they actually care about their clients.

Associate Carson Dudick, Esq. did a PHENOMENAL job getting me a great settlement on a difficult auto accident case. Definitely use them if you need a great, caring personal injury law firm that takes no bullshit from opposing counsel, and doesn't need to waste a penny on TV/radio ads because they're that good!
Everyone at this firm is professional and knowledgeable. I got great service from Rene regarding my personal loss. I definitely recommend them.

I highly recommend Mike Geragos. After an unfortunate automobile accident, he handled my case with professionalism and care from start to finish. He kept me informed throughout the entire process, clearly explaining each step so I always knew where things stood.

What I appreciated most was how little I had to be involved. Mike managed everything on my behalf, allowing me to focus on moving forward rather than dealing with paperwork, phone calls, or negotiations. He worked directly with the auto insurance companies, my health care providers, and my surgeon, and was clearly focused on protecting my interests at every turn.

His negotiation skills were excellent, and he was able to maximize the amount of money I ultimately received. Any time I had questions, he was responsive, clear, and patient. Throughout the process, he was consistently professional and reassuring. I would confidently recommend Mike Geragos to anyone needing a personal injury attorney.

Highly Recommended!
Vlad and the team from C&Z made everything so much easier for us. After jumping from one firm to another and feeling unsure about who to trust, finding C&Z was a huge relief. From the very beginning, Vlad was calm, confident, and incredibly patient in explaining every step of the process.

He made sure we understood our options, kept us informed the whole time, and handled everything with a level of professionalism that truly stands out. What impressed us most was how approachable and genuine he was — you could tell he really cared about helping, not just finishing a case.

If you’re looking for a law firm that actually listens, communicates clearly, and guides you with honesty, I couldn’t recommend Vlad and his team enough. They really went above and beyond for us.

I am and still am impressed. I mattered every time I called Eva and the staff spoke to me with care and attention. They kept me in the loop with everything and that gave me a peace of mind. I had my very own Mickey Holler. 🤭

I would like to express my deepest gratitude to the entire Carpenter & Zuckerman team.
After my accident, I felt overwhelmed and anxious, but the warmth, professionalism, and exceptional teamwork from everyone here gave me comfort, clarity, and complete trust throughout the entire process.

First, I want to sincerely thank Michelle, who always answered my calls with kindness, patience, and genuine care. Her warm guidance brought me so much peace during a very stressful time, and I am truly grateful for her.

I also want to thank Jiu and Yumi for their clear explanations, quick communication, and consistent support. Their dedication made every step incredibly smooth and easy to understand.

I want to give a very special acknowledgment to Attorney Justice.
He is not only a highly skilled lawyer but also someone who truly protects and supports his clients with compassion and integrity.
During my deposition, when I was so nervous that my hands were shaking, Justice stayed beside me, calmly explaining every step, analyzing the opposing counsel’s intentions, and guiding me in a way that made everything understandable. His presence gave me tremendous relief, confidence, and emotional stability.
It is rare to find an attorney who cares so deeply about both the legal and emotional well-being of their clients. Justice is truly an exceptional attorney.

I also want to express my gratitude to Attorney Brian Toppila, whose thoroughness, attention to detail, and genuine commitment were extraordinary. He treated my case with sincere dedication, as if it were his own, and I felt fully supported and protected at all times. Both attorneys are outstanding skilled, thoughtful, and truly client centered.

Another major strength of Carpenter & Zuckerman is that many team members speak Korean, which makes the process much more comfortable for Korean clients, especially elderly community members who may struggle with English. Michelle’s warm support for Korean speaking clients is truly special.

My case has already been successfully settled, and the firm is now helping my daughter receive compensation as well. I couldn't have navigated this journey without the heartfelt care and exceptional professionalism of this amazing team.

I highly recommend Carpenter & Zuckerman to anyone dealing with a car accident.
This isn't just a law firm; it's a team that genuinely cares about their clients and stands by them every step of the way.

Thank you again to the entire team for everything you've done for me and my family.

I'm deeply grateful to the entire Carpenter & Zuckerman team.

While I was exhausted and anxious after this accident, the warmth, professionalism, and incredible teamwork of this team made me confident and able to follow along from start to finish.

First and foremost, I would like to express my sincere gratitude to Michelle, who always answered my calls with a warm and friendly voice and diligently answered even the smallest of questions. Thanks to her, I received great comfort and reassurance during this complex process.

I'm also deeply grateful to Jiwoo and Yumi, who guided me accurately and kindly throughout the entire process. Thanks to their quick communication and dedicated support, the entire process was very smooth and clear.

I especially want to give my sincere praise to Attorney Justice.
Attorney Justice is not just a competent attorney, but a lawyer who protects and supports his clients to the end, possessing both human warmth and outstanding professionalism.
When I was so nervous during my deposition that my hands were shaking, Attorney Justice calmly explained everything step by step, clearly analyzing the other party's intentions, and making it easy for me to understand. At that moment, I felt a deep sense of relief, thinking, "Wow, I have a truly trustworthy lawyer by my side."

It's rare to find an attorney who meticulously cares for my psychological well-being. Attorney Justice is a top-notch attorney who truly protects his clients.

Furthermore, Attorney Brian Toppila's meticulousness and attention to detail are truly top-notch. He treated my case as if it were his own, instilling trust in me, and I was deeply impressed by his meticulous and thorough handling of all documents and procedures.

Both attorneys are outstanding individuals, possessing skill, consideration, and character.

Another great advantage of Carpenter & Zuckerman is that many of its staff speak Korean, allowing Korean clients, especially seniors, to receive comfortable consultations without language barriers. Michelle's attentiveness is truly a source of strength for Korean clients.

I have already successfully completed my compensation process, and thanks to her assistance in obtaining compensation for my child, my daughter's case is also underway. I would never have been able to achieve this without the dedication and dedication of this team.

I highly recommend them to anyone struggling with a car accident.
Carpenter & Zuckerman is not just a law firm; it's a team that truly cares for its clients.
I would like to express my sincere gratitude to the entire team.

This company is highly professional, especially its employees, and particularly Stefania Florez, for her dedication, patience, kindness, and intelligence with clients. Thank you very much.
After my accident I got in contact with Alina Vulic. You are amazing lawyer and great person , thank you for quickly resolving my case and taking the stress off. Thank you again

RENÉ Went above and beyond to make sure all my needs were met. He really went the extra mile to make sure my losses from the accident were recovered and I was fully taken care of. He stayed on top of the case from beginning to end.

reviews.text:
I was a passenger in a serious car accident where another driver crossed a double yellow line and hit us head-on. It was a horrible experience made even worse by how the first law firm I was working with mishandled everything. When I switched to Michael Geragos, it was like night and day. He immediately took control of the situation, explained every step in clear terms, and made sure I understood my options.

Michael was straightforward about my options and guided me through what made the most sense for my situation. Unlike my previous attorney, who rushed to push things forward without much explanation, Michael took the time to help me make a well-informed decision. He made a really stressful time much easier and earned my complete trust. I can’t thank him enough and would absolutely recommend him to anyone who needs an attorney who’s both capable and compassionate.
I am Juan Coronado and I am satisfied with the underline. It was slow, but the goal was achieved, thanks to you, thank you very much.

Amazing ultra super professional law group
I'd like to specially thank Mr Mario Martinez
also all team members
Thanks

We had the privilege of working with Michael Geragos at Carpenter & Zuckerman, and we can confidently say that he is an exceptional attorney. From the very start, he was incredibly helpful and took the time to explain every aspect of our case in a way that made sense. His guidance throughout the process was invaluable—he was always available to answer questions and kept us informed every step of the way.
What truly stood out was Michael's ability to make strategic, well-informed decisions at critical moments in our case. His expertise and professionalism were evident, and he consistently had our best interests in mind. We always felt like we were in good hands, and that made all the difference.
We are genuinely grateful for everything he did, and I highly recommend his services to anyone in need of legal representation. Michael’s dedication and skill truly set him apart. Thank you, Michael, for your hard work and for being such a positive force during what could have been a stressful time.

I cannot speak highly enough about the Carpenter and Zuckerman Law Group! Mikey and his team are absolutely incredible, and helped me navigate a very difficult legal case! From day 1 this firm treated me with incredible kindness, support, and an amazing level of expertise. Mikey and his team worked closely with me every step of the way, and we settled for a sum of money that we were very happy with! I cannot recommend them enough!

I highly recommend the law firm Carpenter & Zuckerman.  My case was handled by Partner Aaron Stiegler and I can't say enough good things about him and his team.  My family and I were rear ended by a driver on the freeway and the driver fled the scene.  My husband was able to get a picture of the driver's license and we called the police.  Unfortunately, the police were not able to do anything for us to help identify the driver.

We were referred by a friend to Aaron Stiegler at Carpenter Zuckerman and we are so glad we contacted him.  Aaron and his team were able to identify the other driver based on the license number we had. They were also able to identify his insurance company.  After the other driver's insurance company was notified about the accident, the other driver lied and denied the accident had happened.  Our lawyers assured us not to worry and that they would make sure the driver was held accountable.  It was really stressful dealing with our injuries and this crazy accident and Carpenter & Zuckerman really helped put us all at ease.

In the end our attorney's not only helped us get the medical treatment we needed.  They also were able to get the insurance company for the other driver to accept full responsibility and pay us the full policy limit. Thank you!!!!

I engaged CZ to support me in seeking compensation following an electric shock injury sustained on the job.

The CZ team was professional, organized, and empathetic.  My lead attorney, Mikey Geragos, was an active listener, who integrated subtle but key observations into the briefing for arbitration.  While the process can be long and frustrating, CZ demonstrated their value by securing a fair but sizable settlement   I highly recommend CZ if you are seeking a top flight litigation firm to represent you in pursuing a civil lawsuit.

Working with Sark Ohanian was an absolute pleasure. Him and his team were responsive, professional, and totally informative throughout the entire process. If you want to work with an attorney who knows what they're doing, who will go the extra mile, and who truly understands your needs as a client, look no further. Thank you so much, Sark, Samantha, Rula, Michael, and the rest of the team for helping me navigate my case. You all are the best! Highly recommend.

Everyone at CZ was extremely kind and patient with my mom during a very stressful time. I would highly recommend CZ to anyone seeking an attorney for personal injury. My mom's attorney, Justice Turner, was a great listener and wonderful advocate. He did a great job with her case. We're all grateful for his hard work and dedication.

I want to say thank you so much to each and everyone at C&Z for all their hard work on my case. Your patience and dedication has helped make this challenging time in my life after my motorcycle accident a lot more manageable.  Robert, Sasha, Angela. You guys are amazing as is the rest of the team. Thanks to you guys I feel that I got the medical treatment that I needed and the settlement that I deserve.  So yeah, thank so much everyone.

Amazing! C&Z, specifically Michael Geragos and his team, are professionals that provide guidance and assistance while going through a difficult situation. I highly recommend Michael and his team to you! They are simply amazing!

I highly recommend CZ, my wife and I were injured on a not at fault accident, and having CZ on our side made a world of difference.  Gabriela Larios and Sark Ohanian had our best interest in mind.  They were always looking out for us throughout the process.  An excellent team, and a great firm, second to none!  Thank you Gabriela, Sark and CZ!

A big thank you to Attorney Sark Ohanian and Gabriela Larios for their outstanding work. They were professional, responsive, and truly dedicated to getting the best result. Their attention to detail and clear communication made the process smooth and stress-free. Thanks to their hard work, I received a settlement that exceeded expectations. Highly recommend C&Z – they’re an incredible team!

If your looking for a personal injury law firm who cares and will fight for you until theirs nothing left to fight for.. CZ Law is the firm you want to represent you. reviews.text:
Following a distressing car accident, I sought the expertise of Carpenter and Zuckerman, grappling with the aftermath of sustaining multiple injuries and the total loss of my vehicle due to another driver's blatant disregard for a red light. Amid my upheaval, I remembered a friend's characterization of Paul Zuckerman as a "Super Tough, yet approachable figure with a generous heart and a distinctive New York Attitude." Their esteemed reputation, I discovered, is indeed well-earned.

In the aftermath of a serious accident, one needs more than mere legal representation; one requires a steadfast advocate who not only tirelessly champions your cause but also deeply values your well-being. From the moment I stepped into their office, the sense of being in capable hands was immediate. Despite the firm's acclaim and their distinction as "Super Lawyers," Paul Zuckerman personally offered his guidance, radiating confidence and solace.

Right from our initial conversation, I was thoroughly convinced of Carpenter and Zuckerman's commitment to securing the comprehensive compensation I rightfully deserved. Paul's assurance of having a committed team in my corner was exemplified not just in words but in action, particularly by Gabriela, who emerged as an unwavering pillar of support; Ivy Callahan, the Department Director of the Lien Department, who was exceptional in swiftly finding an alternative MRI center, securing an appointment in real time, and seamlessly managing the billing and scheduling details; and Anastasiya, the lien negotiator, who worked tirelessly to ensure my medical bills were negotiated down to the bare minimum. The results of her efforts were beyond my expectations, showcasing the depth of commitment and skill within the team.

As my recovery and the legal challenge progressed, Zuckerman and Carpenter assertively confronted the defendant's insurance company, striving for the highest compensation possible. Despite their initial insufficient offer, Paul Zuckerman's steadfast confidence instilled patience in me. His belief in the firm's expertise imbued me with profound trust.

Carpenter and Zuckerman's formidable prowess was unmistakably demonstrated, compelling the insurance company to acknowledge their disadvantage against such a tenacious legal force. In a matter of weeks, they conceded to the demanded settlement amount, a testament to the firm's vigorous advocacy recognized by all.

Under Paul Zuckerman's leadership, Carpenter and Zuckerman operate with unmatched precision and resolve, mirroring a well-coordinated force dedicated to securing justice for their clients, akin to a seasoned general leading a disciplined infantry into battle.

Reflecting on my journey with Carpenter and Zuckerman, it evokes the pinnacle of service excellence, Patrick Mahomes' indomitable spirit, Einstein's intellectual dominance, and the fierce determination of a charging bull. I am profoundly grateful to the entire team, including Anastasiya and Ivy Callahan, for transforming what could have been an overwhelming ordeal into a seamless journey of support and resolution.

Moreover, even after securing my settlement, the firm maintained frequent updates, ensuring clarity on the progress of my disbursement with comprehensive messages that eliminated any doubt about the status of my case. My heartfelt appreciation extends to Carpenter and Zuckerman for their exceptional service, unwavering dedication, and the continuous, transparent communication that guided me through this journey.

My car was rear ended, aggravating a bulging disc. Carpenter & Zuckerman set up all my doctor appointments and paid for everything up front. They were able to get me a settlement for both my injury case and property damage case. I am very happy with the  way they handled my case.

reviews.text: Came here to get help with my injury they exceeded my expectations and got me settled for more than what I could think off Jennifer&Diana were awesome and very helpful , this place really knows what they are doing

JCR LAW GROUP WORKED HARD FOR MY CASE, Everyone in the office is very helpful and explains everything in detail. and I recommend JCR LAW GROUP Thank you.

My wife was recommended to this lawyer firm by two different individuals.  JCR do not seem to have the clients interest more seeming like a factory get a small settlement push it on you so they can be paid & move on.  The intake person sat in our home & lied to us that once signing with JCR the company I work for could not retaliate against me and I would not lose my job, they don’t inform you fully of the cons to your law suit prior to signing, they say what they think you want to hear for you to retain them.  Kimberly called my wife with a menial offer from her company compared to her injuries & she asked her if she would be keeping her job her response was “she did not not know” had no answer and basically wanted the shove the first offer down her throat,  there was no this is just the first offer you can decline for whatever reason or you can accept.  She also told her they don’t get involved in the employment, so why was she asked by the intake person if she wanted to keep her job, which obviously she said yes, why not be up front with a future client about employment, now your calling with a menial offer & she’s probably w/o a job in the end?  My wife asked about keeping her job & she atomically took that as she’s accepting the offer, had my wife not reached out to her out of frustration she would have accepted the offer w/o my wife’s approval, asking a question does not indicate approval.  This was the first time my wife had spoken to them since signing up.  She has called several times each time she called left messages with Nancy for Kimberly her “case negotiator” she’s always on the a phone will return her calls but never does.  How coincidental she’s always on a call each time she calls and never give the courtesy of returning her clients calls, speaks volume. I am sure my wife is not the only person being treated like this.  At her doctors office she complains & their response is they’re not surprised.  How do you call your client with an offer & don’t know the details and when asked about keeping her job she’s told they don’t get involved with you keeping employment when it was clearly stated to the intake person that she wanted to keep her job because her income is vital to her household and if she has any issues on the job to call them but they don’t answer.  Now she should seek employment elsewhere after her life has been now altered/changed & start over, so why did she seek representation and why did they take her case if she wasn’t going to be fully represented? very deceitful very regretful of my wife signing up with these people.  More sounds like we need to report them to the bar so other families don’t get treated this way or go through this.

reviews.text: After my life threatening car accident, the process to recovery was very difficult. Faced with the mental and physical burdens of recovery, I experienced many ups and downs. One of the things that remained constant through all of the noise was Anton’s guidance and support, through the legal process of reaching a settlement. He not only made appointments, spoke to doctors, and did his job, but he went the extra mile, always asking how I’m doing, and if there’s any other way he could add support to my life. After two long years of back and forth, he not only delivered an outcome beyond my expectations, but he helped me find my voice through the process. I learned so much about myself and my strength, being supported by such a phenomenal legal team. The overwhelming amount of work that went into my case and all the hours of conversations that we had regarding my accident so that Anton could get a better sense of what happened to me is what played such a big role in how he represented me. He went above and beyond in every aspect imaginable and I am forever grateful for the effect that he has left on my life. I appreciate his and his team’s effort, care, and support and I couldn’t recommend a better team to represent someone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Elizabeth, thank you so much for your trust and your kind words. You showed grace and patience during a very difficult and complex case, involving catastrophic injuries. reviews.text:
Anton and his team are amazing. They are consistent, communicative, and exhibit perseverance even when things are tough. My case seemed simple and straightforward at first—I was rear-ended by a person who was driving well beyond the speed limit (as confirmed by the police when they arrived on the scene). My car was totaled, I lost various personal items, had two car seats in the vehicle, sustained injuries, and more.

Unfortunately, the person who rear-ended me wasn’t the owner of the vehicle, so the insurance information provided at the scene was inaccurate. Anton had to track down the driver’s personal insurance policy. Once he successfully acquired the policy information, the driver’s insurance carrier denied responsibility because the driver had given them a false account of the incident. At this point, the police report still hadn’t been filed, so Anton called me and asked if I could get in touch with any witnesses.

Thankfully, when the incident occurred, I had called my wife from another person’s phone. I was able to retrieve their contact information, and they were willing to provide a statement. During all of this, Anton connected me with the necessary providers to receive ongoing treatment for my injuries—all of whom were excellent and accommodating.

In the end, Anton was able to secure the full amount of the driver’s insurance coverage. My car loan was paid off, I received reimbursement to replace my car seats, and Anton even paid my hospital bill from the day of the accident out of his own pocket so that I could receive my entire one-third share of the settlement.

Unfortunately, with family law issues it’s rare that both parties will leave happy. At the same time its not rare father’s are taken advantage of by the courts when it comes to custody, child support, and alimony. Long story short we went from paying $3,000/month to the other party, down to $400/month with the help of Issac. If you want good representation be 100% honest about your side of the story and the opposing parties side. Isasac will do everything in his power to help you out. reviews.text: I had a Lyft accident in 2020 that left me with awful pain with my back and caused stress in my life that felt unending. I had no idea it was going to take as long as It did but if you are patient the closure will be beneficial to you. My advice is to stick to the schedule your doctor sets for you and do the best you can to communicate with the staff at Tim Wrights office. If you have questions or concerns call them and it will help to know where they are with your case. This is a good choice for any accident case I believe. Go see for yourself.

reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Danny, we take all cases very seriously. We are very sorry that you feel this way. In general, any law firm will take on those cases that they know they can successfully advocate on behalf of the clients. If there is any information that we learn about a case that would disallow our firm to represent the client to the best of our abilities, we ask to be discharged from the case so that our client can seek other avenues to be compensated for their case. Again, we are very sorry that our law firm could not assist you with your case, but we are available any time you like to discuss why we could not help you with your case. We wish you the best of luck!

reviews.text: Horrible experience with attorney Larry Ajalat. After having almost all our money stolen by former trustee, Upper Street Marketing CEO and de-licensed financial advisor John D. Quinn, we sought to have John removed from the trust. Larry told us it would be a very simple process and all we had to do was send a letter to him and assign a new trustee. He did not honestly evaluate our case and failed to inform us that we did not have sufficient funds for fiduciary expenses and this would be a much more complicated process than writing a letter. When it became evident that we could not afford to assign a new trustee and this was a hopeless situation and we were stuck with this con-man of a trustee who would eventually take our house and the remaining cash in our bank accounts, Larry terminated his services and kept the money we paid him. He claimed it would be "malpractice" to have been honest and told us in the beginning that our case was hopeless.  Our experience with this attorney has only compounded the devastation we have experienced with the financial abuse by the trustee. I will also add that Larry did not do anything on my behalf and I made all phone calls, drafted all documents and did all research. After he terminated services, he did make a false APS report--though not against John.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for the opportunity to address this.

It did appear that Shoko Block was severely victimized by her appointed trustee long ago and our assistance was sought to change that. Otherwise, most of what is stated above is misrepresented. In fact, this review was likely not even written by Shoko, but by a family member who (rather deceitfully) claimed to be Shoko in numerous communications with this office and others.

In any event, as said above, help was sought for a bad situation, and when we tried to help -- including working with trusted agents of theirs, working with the local Regional Center, assisting with reports to proper civil authorities, and seeking out and obtaining the opinions of numerous independent private fiduciaries -- we were unfortunately unable to effectuate any change. Although this was due to factors far out of our control, the client was angry that we didn't foresee this result, and as she said above, we should have told them at the beginning that it was "hopeless" and shouldn't have even tried to help. We do not operate that way – they sought help, and we tried fervently to provide it - we did not believe the situation was "hopeless" at all and attempted several routes to address it. However, we cannot know going into a matter what will happen and we can never guarantee any particular result. We are only sorry her situation was what it was and wish she would have sought help long before it got to the point it was at.

Nevertheless, we still wish the best for Shoko and hope her agents properly fulfill their fiduciary obligations toward her.

Within 24 hours, he provided me with a very detailed summary of the pros and cons of the online documents that I had given him, providing me with scenarios that I had not considered and which had not been addressed in the online program.  With no pressure from Larry, I decided that I really needed a professional to set up my estate documents so that everything necessary would be covered.  I really appreciated Larry's thoroughness and his willingness to help me before I had even engaged his services, so I knew I wanted to work with him.   Once engaged, he was quick to meet with me for our initial informational meeting and even quicker to finalize my documents.  I was so impressed with how communicative he was with me throughout the whole process, always being available to me for any questions that I might have as well as keeping me informed of every step along the way.  I am also impressed with how comprehensive the documents are, including scenarios that have arisen out his many years of experience in the industry.  I am very confident now with Larry's support that I am well-covered legally, and I know he will be there for me if I need him.  Thank you, Larry!

Working with Larry was a pleasure! At every step Mr. Ajalat kept me informed about what he was doing, how long it would take, and what possibilities we could expect. Even though my case was complicated and it was hard to predict how much the settlement would be, Mr. Ajalat gave me an estimate, and was able to get me an amount at the top of that range!

The whole time I felt like I was talking to a real human being, who cared about my situation, thought carefully about things before making decisions, and genuinely wanted me to have a good experience with his firm. Mr. Ajalat was respectful and kind and made what could have been a very stressful situation much better. If you have a case of this type I recommend this firm so highly!

reviews.text:
Absolutely the best Personal Injury attorneys ever!  My experience with PI attorneys has never been flattering.  The ones I've had in the past were your typical ambulance chasers, that treated you like cattle lining up for slaughter.  They had their own agenda to make money for themselves and for  the doctors and experts they had on for kick backs.  So I knew I was NEVER going to go back to a former PI attorney that I hired, and I was reluctant on actually searching for another one.  But somehow I lucked out and was referred to Peerali Law.  Serena was my attorney and she was hands down the best!!  It was a 180 experience I had with her from the experience I had with my other PI attorneys.  She actually cared, about me!!  She listened and comforted me.  At times I was reluctant to go forward, but she explained everything so clearly and carefully, I knew that I was in the right hands.  Everyone that was in contact with me from Peerali had the same caring attitude and advice for me.  They made themselves available to me and made me comfortable to ask the litany of questions I had for them on almost a daily experience.  The process was not quick in any means, but that was not my concern.  Honestly I wondered if I was wasting their time.  But they stuck by me happily always asking if there was anything else I needed.  The professionals and doctors that I was sent to were top notch.  Not just a numbers game, get you in, log the appointment, and send a bill.  They followed up and really cared about me getting better.
My accident was a trip and fall, where I fractured my elbow.  Thanks to Serena and her team at Peerali I got the best care I could ever hope for.
I'm not wishing to need a PI attorney again, but if for any reason I did, I know exactly who I am calling.  Thank you so much Serena and everyone at Peerali Law!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing! We are thrilled to hear that our team at Peerali Law, especially Serena, provided you with the care, support, and legal assistance you deserved. It's truly rewarding to know that we were able to make a positive impact during a challenging time. Your kind words mean a lot to us, and we appreciate your trust in our firm. If you ever need our services in the future or have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you again for choosing Peerali Law!

reviews.text: Peerali Law is one of the best law firms I have had the personal opportunity to work with regarding my personal injury matter. I am a retired legal litigation secretary (40 years). Since that firm was soon closing its doors, that firm referred me to Peerali Law and Serena Peerali. I couldn't be happier with the professional and personal service I received. When I initially contacted Peerali Law, Serena immediately took my call and gathered all the information and "went to work" on my case. Most times, when I had reason to contact Peerali Law, I was able to speak with Serena on the first attempt to reach her. However, if I was not, she always timely returned my call. Serena allowed me to express my feelings and always inquired as to how I was doing physically and mentally. Serena was able to get a great settlement (more than I ever anticipated) from the former management company for the HOA because it was responsible for the upkeep of the landscape at the development and that swimming pool. No doubt, Serena's knowledge of the law and professional and courteous personality led to an early settlement of the matter. From my work experience, where I have dealt with hundreds of lawyers, The Peerali Law Firm stands among the best!

reviews.text:
Wow!  Much better outcome than expected-- $$$!

In 2019 my identity was stolen and the ID thief applied for a credit card in my name. The credit card arrived at my house and since I did not have an account with the particular credit card company, I knew immediately that the card was fraudulent. So I called the company that issued the card to explain that I did not request the card and that the account was fraudulent.  Problem solved, right?  Nope, they dropped the ball, and allowed cash advances on the card in the following months, then the company tried to make me pay for it.  I found myself in collections hell!

I have always been meticulous about my credit, paying all payments well before the due date and maintaining minimal debt. As a result of the creditor’s actions, my credit score dropped hundreds of points as I refused to pay for it. After all, I had notified the company right from the start that I hadn’t applied for the account and that it was fraudulent.  I escalated the issue through the creditor's fraud department, the Better Business Bureau, and the Consumer Financial Protection Board.  I wrote certified letters to the credit reporting agencies and the credit card companies as recommended on the Federal Trade Commission website. Still nothing changed, and my low credit score was keeping me from refinancing my house.

Enter Bob Brennan and his team.  They took the case, and immediately filed a lawsuit on my behalf against the credit card company and the credit reporting bureaus (no money out of pocket, btw).  Initially, I just wanted them to remove the negative marks on my credit report and to stop harassing me with collections calls, but Bob Brennan did more than that, and I received a good cash settlement as well from each of the defendants. Per the settlement agreement, I can't tell you what we settled for, nor can I identify the creditor, but with the settlement I was able to pay off my mortgage last week (it was a lot of money!).  Bob Brennan really turned a negative into a positive for me.  You should know their team is awesome. Special shout out to paralegal Bob Bichler who spent a lot of time with me, walking me through the process of preparing for the court case, mediation and settlement. reviews.text: I had deal with many attorneys when I was looking for an attorney for my case. Many would not return calls, some would want a consultation fee and would not even have time to hear the details of the case just brief summary and instead of hearing the detail they disappeared with the fee I paid. All wanted just a brief summary of my case not the details. So, like me who’s english is not that great , not that educated and has trouble explaining things. You could have a case but since it not explained properly you would get the wrong advice by giving just a brief summary of what happened.   My case had to do with a contract dispute with a well known large car dealership In the San Fernando Valley. When I spoke with one of staff members Mrs Rachel. Since the first call I received from her it was different she wanted to know all the details of the case. She didn’t make me feel like I was wasting their time. Once my case was accepted Mr Robert Bichler was the staff member who worked on my case. Mr Bichler always made sure I was update or knew the status of my case. Mr Bichler probably knew my case better than me. Every time I would speak with him to go over something or a question arose it’s like he already knew my answer because of how well and how much time he put into my case. Only reason I was told was to verify his answer. When It came down to hearings or depositions Mr Brennan was so well prepared I don’t think him losing my case ever crossed my mind. Since the first hearing  when I saw how professional and  how well prepared he was  I knew that he and his staff did not take my case lightly. They do their best to win all their case. My case took close to 3 years had to have investigators, hand writing experts, uncooperative witness not once did it feel my case was going nowhere. I feel that all their case if something or someone would help his case he and his staff would not hesitate to use and do what’s best for his client and the case .Like I stated earlier from day one Mr Brennan and his staff Rachel, Bob, Juan and even his secretary were all very professional. My calls were always accepted. I would always get a call back. I was always up to date in what was going on with my case. Not once did I feel my case was not important or was just sitting there collecting dust. It made of taken close to three years but the result was more that I expected. Hiring Mr Brennan would benefit anyone case.

I was told that Mr. Brennan was the best in the business and it is accurate. Mr. Brennan is a wonderful attorney, generous and kind person, and a tireless advocate for consumer justice. He and his whole team, especially Mr. Bichler, never tired in seeking a favorable outcome for me, even as my small case dragged on for over a year. I would heartily recommend this team to anyone in need of representation in what appears to be a seemingly dauntless situation that is set up to favor corporations over people.

reviews.text:
Mr. Brennan represented my dad in a drawn-out personal injury case, for which I was called as a witness.

Because of this I had the opportunity to watch Mr. Brennan in action and was quite impressed with his skill and manner in presenting the case.

Throughout my dad’s long ordeal, I never heard anything other than complimentary comments about Mr. Brennan and his staff.

Most importantly Mr. Brennan was able to conclude the case to a good result.

Although I am not a litigious person I found myself in a position where I found the need for an attorney to right a wrong.  I had met with several lawyers in the process, and although they were likable as individuals, none left me with a feeling of confidence or that I would be in the best hands.  That is until I met Robert Brennan.

I was immediately struck with his professionalism and honest assessment of what lie ahead – no fluff, just fact.  Moreover, I was struck with his accomplishments and background that I subsequently researched.

So began a very long journey in an effort to gain a little justice.

Through out the eight and one-half year process Bob, as I came to know him, never wavered and continued to plug away at the case that the opposition continually tried to block, thwart and stall.  Through all of this he retained a conservative optimism, as is proper for his profession.

When the day finally came that we were at trial I realized that I indeed had made the correct decision in choosing Bob.

He is a VERY quick witted and skilled litigator that knows his business.  He was able to counter every less that honorable move by the defense, while all the while maintaining an affable or friendly demeanor that won over the jury and seemingly the judge in the case.  It was a real life experience of watching a more personable version of Perry Mason at work.

We won the case and the subsequent appeal that has been life changing for me.

I needed help with an annoying rental/tenant issue, and Bob came to the rescue with exactly what I needed to terminatedly handle the situation. He knew exactly what to write, and provided the legal information and presence I needed to get compliance on my issue.

I can't tell you the peace that brings, knowing someone like Bob is in my corner. Thank you!  You've always been the icon of sanity and legal expertise.

Bob and his team were excellent advocates in my debt collection/fair credit reporting case against a very aggressive credit bureau and debt collection agency.  They fought zealously, and we were able to achieve a satisfactory settlement.  As an attorney myself, I was really pleased with the work of the firm and the outcome!

Manukyan Law Firm went to bat for me when NO ONE else would. I had an employment related case and didn't know where to turn or what legal route to take. When shopping around, most firms treated me like a number and it was obvious very early on that they were seeking out "clear cut" cases where they would make a hefty buck off of distressed clients stuck in a corner. There was no real compassion and I felt defeated. I was VERY close to giving up---but thankfully I found Edgar and his dedicated team.

Upon my initial consultation, I immediately felt heard. This was something I hadn't felt in a LONG time--especially with my previous employer. Edgar called me in and broke down every detail and laid out realistic expectations regarding my case. He opened my eyes to the incredible amount of rights I had as a California Employee. He made me understand that it's not okay to be discriminated against by ANY employer under ANY circumstance-especially when you belong to a protected class (age, disability, gender etc...).

Fast forward a year and some change... my case was settled! Edgar fought relentlessly and aggressively litigated my case to a very fruitful settlement. His communication was prompt throughout. His overall demeanor was professional yet sometimes playful when the occasion called for it--a very organic  balance! This experience was exemplary from start to finish--I recommend Edgar and team to anyone who is looking for an actual litigator--not just a firm that sits on their butts and sends some emails and expects a settlement.

Roy Manukyan Social Security Disability Lawyer

This firm provides excellent representation on a contingency basis.  After being refused SSDI insurance from the federal government, my boyfriend and I sought their assistance.
After a second appeal was rejected, which was expected, Roy saw the case through to the administrative judge hearing, including coaching my boyfriend on what would be expected at the hearing and what responses were ideal.
Happily, my boyfriend was finally approved for the disability insurance he needed. We could not have done it without the help of this excellent firm. Highly recommended.

He pressured me to sign an NDA that he said "has little risk", but after spending a month reviewing the document on my own behalf I found 5+ points of very large risk. If I had followed his advice I would've surely shot myself in the foot and lost the majority of my financial future. Sloppy mistakes were constantly made, like not knowing where my business was located, making mistakes on the year of incorporation etc. Over the two months of working with him he did not uncover a single point of leverage or give me any insight into whether I had a case or not. I have literally had more progress on my case in the 15 minutes of talking with another lawyer then I have had in the 2 months of time I spent with L&F brown. I highly regret the time and money I spent in partnership there. I had spent the little amount of cash I had left in hopes of finding a lawyer that would fight for me and protect me, instead I am now down upwards of 3500 dollars & 2 months+ of time and energy with nothing to show for it. I would recommend anyone that is looking for a lawyer that fights for your best interests ahead of their own monetary gain to look somewhere else.
