reviews.text:
Aloha:

I was wandering around a vast desert of bad choices for lawyers willing to help me with my family situation. Good thing I stumbled upon Patil as a recommendation from a reputable family trust attorney. She turned out to be an abundant oasis of assistance, both practically, and psychologically, as she sympathetically assured and comforted me with her confidence and competent abilities. Prior to receiving a reference to Patil, I googled LA attorneys with the expertise I was seeking out. One had 70 5-star reviews, but after giving me ample time for an initial consultation and expressing interest, I took time to prepare, and I sent him my documentation, and eventually followed up due to a lack of response, but I never heard back from him again. A polite denial of interest would have been appreciated. Another that popped up in the Google search had mediocre--at best--reviews. The criticisms were that his incompetent son managed his office, and he was difficult to speak to in person. I was so desperate that I gave him a chance, but when I called his office, his son told me I would have to show up in person, not over the phone, or Zoom, which was a deal-breaker, considering I live in Hawai'i.

From day one, Patil assured me that her handling of my case would eventually put us in the driver's seat of the situation, and it did. The plaintiff who filed the frivolous suit against me was begging for a deal, instead of going to court. He was so intimidated by Patil's competent demeanor, he never showed up to court...twice! The case against me was dismissed. Patil seemed to undercharge me so much--not counting hours that should have been counted--it made me feel a little guilty. I am a humble government worker, so my means are limited, but I was happy to pay the reasonable rates and hours she charged me, and she was definitely worth every penny!

Her responsiveness to every phone call, text, and email helped me understand the important intricacies of my case, and her sensitivity, empathy, and sympathy shined brightly in every interaction. I can't begin to say enough about how much Patil helped me, and in so many ways. She definitely goes above and beyond the call of duty, and I would not think twice about engaging her again, in the unfortunate event she was needed for me to defend myself against a member of my own family. Thank you so very much Patil!

As a former prosecutor who worked opposite Anand Desai in numerous serious and violent felony trials, I can say without hesitation that Anand is one of the most skilled trial attorneys I’ve encountered in the courtroom.

Anand was a public defender at the time, and I witnessed firsthand his unwavering dedication to his clients, his command of the law, and his poise under pressure. He consistently demonstrated professionalism, integrity, and exceptional advocacy skills—even in the most high-stakes cases.

What stood out most was Anand’s ability to connect with a jury. He was articulate, strategic, and always meticulously prepared. It was clear that he had earned the trust of his clients, the respect of judges, and the attention of every prosecutor who went up against him.

Now that he’s in private practice, I have no doubt he brings that same energy, skill, and commitment to every personal injury client he represents. If I had a family member who needed a fierce and honest advocate, I’d send them to Anand Desai.

— Ted Swanson, Former Deputy District Attorney
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ted, I’m genuinely grateful. We spent years on opposite sides of the aisle, and when a prosecutor who battled me in serious felony jury trials vouches for my preparation, ethics, and connection with juries—it hits different. Your words mean a lot not just to me, but to my team. They’re the ones returning calls, organizing records, and making sure our clients feel heard. We’ll keep bringing courtroom-level preparation to negotiations and, when needed, to trial. That’s the promise.
Thank you for the endorsement and for the professionalism you’ve shown over the years. Adversaries in court, allies in raising the bar.
-Anand

reviews.text: I am so sad and frustrated with this law firm, and I think these reviews are fake,because they took my case in late 2024 through lawyer Nick. Shortly after, he told me he already had a no-negotiation offer of $10,000. Shortly after, they sent documents for me to sign, saying I would only receive $4,500. Up to that point, everything was fine. Shortly after, I was detained by immigration. I had my husband inform them of my situation. In response, they said they would contact me or send a letter to the detention center where I was being held. They never did. When my husband called them again, they said they wouldn't give any information because he wasn't the owner of the case. I was in prison for 11 months, and in the end, they deported me to my country here in Africa. When I got out, I contacted them, and they told me my case was closed and that they had already sent my check. I wanted to know how I could send a check knowing that I still had to decide whether I wanted a direct deposit or a check. And when I ask questions, they transfer my calls to Vanessa Salas, who yells at me like a child, and other times they ignore me until my credit runs out. I feel exhausted and don't know what to do because all I want is to know if the check was actually made and sent, to track the check, and if someone took it, a legal order has to happen, but nothing has. Vanessa threatens me, as if I hadn't informed them about my situation. And as if that weren't enough, I don't believe they sent that check to my address, and I think that knowing I was detained, they took advantage of the situation and don't want to give me the money. They are inhumane. How can they take money from someone in need? Knowing that during the case I spent days unable to work because I was sick, and the fact that I was deported makes my vulnerability even worse, I question where the justice is? I feel abused, discriminated, threatened, and taken advantage of because I don't know who else can help me, even if they are lawyers. What you did to me was very inhumane, and I need this money. I won't let it go like this. Because I have nothing to start my life, the money is already mine, I am not asking for you to give it to me, I was injured at work. There is a God who sees everything and punishes acts of injustice and violence, especially for people who deal with laws like you. Please, I need my money, and I will never recommend anyone to you after everything you did to me. I won't let anyone go through what I'm going through, and I am truly so sad and very regretful for letting your firm take my case this people are very rude, especially the collection manager Vanessa Salas, who discriminated against me and yelled like I was her baby

reviews.text: Liana Stepanyak is the worst lawyer. after you sent me the documents to sign, you should have called me and told me I sent you a letter to sign and you just took it and sent it without informing me that I had to sign some documents. What about the fact that I didn’t see this document, maybe these documents ended up in spam, how can I not call you to find out whether I received these documents or not. And that they didn’t call me or ask for interest, I received the documents, you can’t prove in any way that you called me after you sent me the documents to sign. You just don’t treat your clients with care, you’re only interested in money. You failed my body instead of saying well, I’m sorry, it’s my mistake for not informing you for further action, you took and did not give me the full amount, you kept $400 for yourself and said my working hour costs $400. I have been looking for eight months, there is no action on my part, how do you not call me, ask why I don’t sign, have you received the document? You just forgot and you have no time for me. And now I need to make it look like I’m guilty of something. You have a lot of clients and you forgot about me.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Garik,

I am sorry you feel that I am “the worst lawyer,” provided that your opinion is based on a limited encounter you and I had. After you hired my office for your legal matter, I collected the information I needed from you and told you that I will draft your court papers and forward them to you for your review and signature. I drafted your documents within a few days after our conversation and emailed them to you for signing. When I did not receive the signed documents back from you, I called you a few days later, however you did not take my call and I left you a voicemail. You did not return my call, nor got in touch with my office, until recently.

Given the nature of the type of law I practice, we do not push our clients to pursue litigation. Frequently, after our clients take the first step in initiating a legal action, they pause to re-think and make sure if they actually want to proceed. That is why your failure to communicate with us was viewed as a desire to reconsider to move forward.

You called my office last week and asked if your case had been finalized. When I told you that I have not received the signed papers back from you, you denied ever receiving them. However, you checked your email and confirmed that you did in fact receive the documents from me. You also denied ever receiving a voicemail from me. I offered to file your court documents as soon as I received the signed documents from you. However, you blamed me for your failure to notice my email, and not being persistent in continuing to get in touch with you to push you to sign your documents, and requested a refund. Your refund was sent to you right away.

The lack of communication on our part was not to avoid to do the work for you, as you did receive your completed papers from us. As a general rule, when clients stop communicating with us for several months, we take a step back to give them time to re-evaluate their decision whether they want to pursue a legal action or not.
Law Offices of Liana Stepanyan

Grateful Beyond Words – Outstanding Experience with Grigoryan Law

Nikki is by far the best attorney!! After being involved in a traumatic car accident with my toddler in the vehicle, I was confused and stressed and did not know how to proceed. To make matters worse, the at-fault driver didn’t have any insurance. Thankfully, I found Grigoryan Law, and it was the best decision I could have made during such a difficult time.

From the very beginning, the team at Grigoryan Law was incredibly compassionate and responsive, which is exactly what I needed. They made me feel heard and supported every step of the way. They explained my options clearly and reassured me that I had rights and a path forward, even though the other driver was uninsured.

Thanks to their thorough and aggressive handling of my case, I was able to receive the full policy limits under my own insurance—something I didn’t even know was possible before speaking with them. They made sure I received the medical treatment I needed, and they handled all the paperwork and negotiations so I could focus on my recovery, as well as, my toddlers’.

What stood out most was their genuine nature. Everyone on Nikki’s team, including Jasmine and Patrick, were there to answer any questions or concerns that I had.  They always kept me up to date on my case and answered all my questions. They weren’t just working a case — they were looking out for my family’s future. That kind of dedication is rare, and I’ll never forget it.

If you’ve been in an accident and need someone to fight for you, Grigoryan Law is the firm I highly recommend. They truly go above and beyond, which is hard to find these days. I will be forever grateful for their help during one of the most stressful times in my life.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Exceptional Representation from Grigoryan Law!

I can’t say enough great things about the Grigoryan Law Firm. After my accident, I was confused, stressed, and unsure of what steps to take. From the very first phone call, the team at Grigoryan Law (Nikki, Jasmine, and Patrick) made me feel supported and understood. They took the time to explain everything clearly, handled all the legal complexities, and made sure I could focus on healing while they handled the rest.

Nikki Grigoryan is not only a sharp and knowledgeable attorney but also incredibly compassionate. It’s rare to find someone who combines professionalism with genuine care for their clients, but that’s exactly what you get here. Every question I had was answered promptly, and I was always kept in the loop about my case’s progress.

The outcome of my case exceeded my expectations — and it wouldn’t have been possible without their hard work, dedication, and expertise. They negotiated fiercely on my behalf and made sure I received the compensation I truly deserved. I truly feel blessed to have worked with such wonderful and knowledgeable people.

If you’re in need of a personal injury attorney, I highly recommend Grigoryan Law. They treat you like family and fight like warriors. I’m beyond grateful for everything they did for me.

reviews.text:
My legal journey with this law office began back in 2017, and after many years of patience and perseverance, we finally received a favorable judgment on July 3, 2025. Throughout this long and emotionally taxing case, Mr. Rafi Ourfalian Mr. Alexander Frais  stood by my side as more than just attorneys — they were my advocates, my support system, and, at many points, like family.

From the very beginning, I could tell the difference in the way they carried themselves compared to the opposing counsel. Their ability to speak clearly, convincingly, and with authority in front of the judge was truly admirable. With just a few words, they consistently made powerful arguments that cut straight to the truth.

What set them apart wasn’t just their legal expertise — it was their humanity. They truly cared. They listened. They treated my case like it was their own. Everyone in their office was equally professional, kind, and attentive. I felt respected, valued, and uplifted each time I spoke with anyone there.

Mr. Rafi Ourfalian  and Mr. Alexander Frias never made me feel like a client. They made me feel like a brother — someone they were fighting for not just out of duty, but out of a shared sense of justice. That’s a rare feeling to find in any professional relationship, especially in the legal world.

I’ve worked with many professionals in the U.S., but I can honestly say that this team is the best I’ve ever had the honor to work with. If you’re looking for attorneys who not only know the law, but live it with integrity, empathy, and unwavering dedication — look no further.

reviews.text:
I’m Nenita. I cannot express enough how grateful I am for the incredible service provided by Djougourian Law Firm. After my car accident in the early morning of January 26, 2024, I was feeling overwhelmed  and uncertain about the legal process, not only that an ambulance took me to the nearest hospital which was the Methodist medical center which is now the USC Arcadia Hospital in Arcadia, that due to the impact of the car that hit my car I was thrown four lanes forward that cause me to past out.
However, from the very first consultation with the law firm, the team was attentive, compassionate, and highly knowledgeable. Atty Arthur Djougourian took the time to explain every step of the process patiently, ensuring that I understood my rights and options, and most importantly he took care right away my health condition. Their dedication to my case was evident, as they work tirelessly to gather evidence and negotiate with insurance on my behalf. Thanks to their expertise, I received a settlement that far exceeded my expectations.

I highly recommend Arthur Djougourian Law Firm to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney such as slip and fall, car accidents, etc. They truly care about their clients and fight for the best possible outcomes. Thank you for everything, Atty Djougourian, you’re the best!

reviews.text:
*** TOP SHELF PERSONAL INJURY COUNCEL***

While driving my F350 Super Duty truck I was stopped on the freeway due to traffic and was rear-ended at high speed by a compact car.  Because of the heavy-duty trailer hitch that was on the truck at the time the damage to my truck was mostly non-existent and all the impact transferred to me, the driver.

Inasmuch as the “visible” damage was limited, when I consulted a “big time radio advertising PI firm,” they turned down representing me due to my vehicle “doesn’t show in a picture the level of damage that will get a fast settlement.”  They gave not a single “poop” about my injuries as, per the intake clerk “soft tissue damage doesn’t get large settlements.”  I felt like I was talking to the other side’s insurance company.

My orthopedic specialist who treated my injuries had experience with Arthur Djougourian and recommended that I give him a call.  I did so and instantly clicked with Arthur.  I found Arthur to be the perfect balance of prioritizing my care and recovery for his client(s) and never hurried along my treatment(s) in order to facilitate a “quick claim.”

And when it came time to wrap up my compensatory injury claim, Arthur demonstrated a well-balanced blend of legal finesse and aggressive representation that resulted in a very substantial compensatory settlement; certainly, greater than what I expected.

For more than three decades I have worked with several attorneys as an analyst and expert witness.  During that time I’ve developed a keen sense of an attorney who is good at their practice and prioritizes the needs of those whom they represent, and those who are an easy laydown for the insurance companies and just want to settle your claim ASAP and get paid and move on.  My opinion of how an attorney handles their practice and client(s) is a well-qualified opinion based on both observation and personal experience.

With Arthur, I never felt like I was nothing more than just a “file/claim” that is to be moved through “the system” as fast as possible and move onto the next victim.

Arthur Djougourian gets my highest, and qualified, recommendation if you’re in need of legal representation for a personal injury claim.
reviews.ownerResponse: Charles, thank you so much for your extensive review. It really means a lot to us to hear from those that we serve. Please let us know if we may ever be of help to any friends/family.

In 2020, we were subjected to mold exposure and sought a law firm who could help me and my family seek compensation for the years of landlord neglect that affected me and my family physically and emotionally. Absolutely no law firm wanted to take on the case - except for the firm of Seber Bulger Law. I was told mold cases are difficult to litigate and win. But the team of Jonathan Seber and Jim Bulger were confident they would be able to find the peace of mind and compensation my family deserved. All they asked for was our patience, and they would handle the rest. Their strategy, approach and client service was  exceptional. Throughout the entire process, they walked us through every detail of the case - so we were always informed and aware. This was extremely helpful because we worked as a team. Getting in touch with Jonathan and Jim was always easy, and they never gave my case to a paralegel. It was always Seber and Bulger who handled my case. Now, I knew this was not going to be a million-dollar settlement, but for Seber and Bulger, they handled it like it was - and that was all we could ask for. Now remember they asked for our patience - well I'm happy to say after 4 years of litigation, Seber and Bulger Law made it happen! They were able to get my family a financial settlement on a case that no other law firm would touch. Other firms would have probably dropped me as a client after a couple years - but this firm was also patient, but more importantly very skilled in getting the compensation and peace of mind their clients deserve. Thank you, Jonathan and Jim! Well done!

Jim represented and advised me throughout the process of my claim. He always had a way of putting my nerves and frustrations at ease and couldn’t have been any nicer and made himself more available whenever I had questions even with my more annoying questions. We have attained a settlement I couldn’t be more happy with. Thank you Jim, you are extremely appreciated not only by me but my wife as well since she didn’t have to deal with me as much through this process.

Jim Bulger provides outstanding service, and I could not be happier with my decision to have him represent me after being injured in an auto accident. He completely took the reins and fought my battle with the insurance company for me when I was too physically and mentally fragile to do so. He was honest, reassuring and trustworthy, and handled my case with the utmost sensitivity and respect. He gave me updates throughout the process, and made himself available when the situation called for it.  I was very happy with the financial outcome as it was a considerable sum, and he was able to secure it in a timely fashion.

I am extremely satisfied with the services Jim provided, and trust him implicitly. Hopefully, I never need his services again, but if I do, Jim has found a lifelong client in me. I cannot recommend his practice enough.
Excellent, strategic and caring, these guys were the best. They treat you like family and take care of you.
Jonathan was great throughout. Thorough and practical. We won the case.
Wonderful attorneys. Please refer this law firm to your friends and family!

Seber Bulger Law group was one of three recommendations from another attorney that was working on our mom's estate (Schomer Law). After the first phone call with Mr. Bulger (Jim) where I presented our family's case to him, I felt an immediately relief that this was the right firm/the right person to handle our case. I was the family member in charge of working with Jim. I ask a lot of questions for understanding and sometimes out of frustration. Not once did I feel like I was bothering him or felt like he was too busy to return my calls. I never felt handed off to someone else. He was always honest and clear and never promised any results. He kept assuring us that we were doing the right thing no matter what and brought comfort as we dealt with the untimely death of our mother. His approach to the case was respectful and sensitive. He is an amazing lawyer and knows his stuff! We were more than a case to win. If it wasn't for Seber Bulger Law group, my family would not have found closure - even though it was hard to hear some of the evidence. Ultimately he won our case which helped us to refinance our mom's home and ultimately honor her and continue her legacy.

Where do I begin…

Both Jonathan & Jim are the most honest, kind, patient, understanding, knowledgeable, professionally skilled attorneys I’ve came across!  They’ve taken on 3 unfortunate cases for me and my son within the last decade or so, and they’ve been amazing and wonderful to work with every single time!

In all 3 cases they’ve managed to get us a very good recovery; without going to trial, or inquiring an insane cost.

The 1st case was my son’s in which involved LAUSD, and they did everything in their power to always make him feel at ease and well represented; while looking out for his best interest.  Right when trial was set to commence they were able to reach a good settlement for him; taking off the pressure and stress of a dreadful and emotional trial at a young age.

So, when I found myself in the middle of a legal civil issue with the management company of the building I resided in, I reached back out to them for some advice, and although I was just looking to get some legal advice, they were willing to take on this corporate behemoth and seek some justice out for me and my household.  We had, had some major mold issues amongst some other maintenance issues and I felt very overwhelmed.  Jim & Jonathan again showed their exceptional skills and knowledge and reached a settlement beyond what these type of cases usually settle for, and held this company accountable for their actions, while getting us the justice we were seeking.

Bring us to the 3rd.

After an unfortunate car accident with major injuries.  I knew the only firm I felt comfortable with and trusted was theirs.  So, once again I turned to them. After an uphill battle with the insurance company and opposing counsel, I can say they did it AGAIN!!!  I can’t say enough, or even have the words to express my gratitude to these two…

I’ve met a lot of attorneys in my life time, I have a fair amount of acquaintances that work in their field, even some I consider friends; but I can honestly say I have never came across another pair with the empathy, compassion, ethical morals, and good character as these two guys here.

I’m an Afro-Latina Woman that unfortunately have had my share of bad luck and some very uncomfortable situations and conversations where I’ve been made to feel less than, or not heard at all.  This was never the case with Jonathan & Jim.  They both took their time to listen to my concerns, take in my input.  I never felt pressured, or dismissed, or ignored.  They kept me in the loop every step of the way, always had time to take my calls, and when not available to do so they would call me back in a timely matter or send me a txt.  They would check up on us, just to make sure we were doing okay, every single time.  They were amazing and I can only hope & pray that I don’t find myself in need of them again, but if I find myself in another legal bind; with out hesitation I know who to turn to!!

I would recommend them to anyone I know, family, friends, and anyone else in need of good legal/civil representation.  You can’t go wrong with them!
Mr. Seber guided us through a very intense housing situation - truly appreciate his work and service.

If you're seeking integral, knowledgeable, and effective legal representation driven by higher values, you've arrived.

Jonathan Seber and Jim Bulger are client-focused as one of their top values. They strive to understand the goals and desires of the client, not just in terms of monetary outcome but also emotional and mental experience.

Let's face it, legal issues are on the top 10 list of most stressful life events. I wanted legal representation from professionals who understand and honor that. Seber Bulger delivered.

They advised me through each step of the process what would be required of me in terms of time, paperwork preparation, likely monetary outcome, and interaction with the defendant's attorneys and/or the defendants themselves so I was able to make an informed decision about how I wanted to proceed in a way that was aligned and right for me.

They supported my decisions every step of the way in showing up at their best, worked diligently to achieve the best possible financial outcome, and ultimately resolved my legal concerns in a way that I felt was balanced, peaceful, and ultimately freeing.

Seber Bulger go above and beyond expectations, even after the legal issues have been resolved should you have any related questions or concerns that arise that pertain to settlement agreements and such. They are genuinely eager to help in any way they can even after they've been paid.

I have confidently referred multiple friends and associates to them for these reasons and more and will continue to do so should the need arise!

Jim Bulger went above and beyond. My case was handled with supreme diligence, clarity, and grace. The communication was absolutely stellar; I never felt in the dark about anything. My gratitude for them is infinite.

Thank you again Seber Bulger for all your hard work!

reviews.text: If you are looking for an extremely intelligent and caring attorney then I would have to suggest Lara. Unfortunately the legal community is riddled with lawyers who treat you the exact same way that a public defender treats you. Public defenders have massive case loads and they only thing they care about is making a bad deal and moving on to their next case. At least the public defenders have an excuse, they are underpaid, and overwhelmed. Unfortunately you can get the same type of representation from a private attorney who collects your money and doesn’t care. Honestly there were times in my case in which if felt like Ms Yeretsian cared more than me. You don’t want a “welp, we will see what happens” you want a “screw them, Im not gonna let them get away with this” type of lawyer. That’s who she is! She personalized my case and made me feel like she was just as angry/frustrated with this abuse of system as I was. You want someone who is not just fighting for you but also right there with you. I had both a criminal case and a civil case. After hiring her for the criminal case in which she got the charges dismissed I then hired her for the civil case in which she went to court and put the other side to shame.  Outside of everything I have stated, one of the biggest qualities she has is her creativity. I promise if you hire her you will continuously have that “wow I didn’t even think of that” moment. She finds ways to use insignificant moments and evidence and twists them into a way that is beneficial to your case.  Obviously I pray to never need her criminal defense services again but I will definitely be recommending her to anyone in future who needs criminal defense. As for any civil proceedings I am unsure if she takes civil cases on a regular basis but if there is LITIGATION involved then I suggest you seek her out, she’s a bull dog in the court room!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Shawn for trusting me with your matter. It was truly a pleasure to advocate on your behalf and get the great results we did.

reviews.text:
My experience with SAG Law Group has been very disappointing. If you're looking for a firm where your case doesn't receive adequate attention, where communication is minimal, and follow-up is slow, then this place probably fits the bill.

After waiting for more than a year for progress in my case, I realized my file had been passed around by several case managers. Because of these constant changes, it seemed like no one was really following up on my case or giving it the attention it deserves. Every time I tried to get clear information, it was frustrating, and I felt like I had to start explaining everything from scratch again.

Part of my frustration also stemmed from trying to get answers and follow-up from Jorge and Edson. When you hire a law firm, you expect professionalism, organization, and consistent communication, especially when it involves something as important as a legal case.

After all this waiting and lack of progress, I decided to sign with another law firm that has better reviews and that I hope will actually give my case the proper follow-up.

A legal case is a very serious matter, and you need to trust that your legal team is actively working on it. Unfortunately, that wasn't my experience here.

My case was transferred to Sage Law Group from Joseph B. Ryan’s office, and unfortunately, the issues with lack of communication continued after the transfer.

Despite the change in firms, I experienced the same pattern: unanswered calls and messages, no meaningful updates, and no clear explanation of the status of my case. As a client, I have a reasonable expectation of timely communication, transparency, and diligence none of which have been provided.

This matter has now spanned several years, and being repeatedly ignored has caused unnecessary stress and concern about whether my case is being properly handled. An attorney has an ethical obligation to keep clients informed and to act with reasonable promptness. In my experience, those obligations were not met.

I strongly advise anyone considering this firm to get all communication expectations in writing and to keep detailed records. If communication and representation standards are not upheld, remember that filing a complaint with the State Bar is an available and appropriate course of action. I will be filing a bar complaint myself.

reviews.text:
I am thrilled to share my exceptional experience with The Sage Group Law Firm, which recently helped me navigate a challenging arbitration settlement with Tesla. From the very beginning, I was met with professionalism, expertise, and unwavering support that ultimately led to a successful resolution. I cannot speak highly enough of the firm's commitment to their clients and their deep understanding of consumer law in Washington State.

My journey started when I found myself in a frustrating situation with Tesla. Initially, I was compelled to participate in Tesla's own arbitration process, only to have my claim denied. However, thanks to the invaluable guidance of The Sage Group Law Firm, my case took a significant turn for the better.

One of the standout individuals I had the privilege of working with was David Ruben, a legal expert at The Sage Group. David's knowledge of consumer law in Washington State was truly outstanding. From our very first conversation, he displayed a deep understanding of the complexities surrounding my case and outlined a clear path forward.

Throughout the entire process, David's communication was exemplary. He consistently kept me informed about every step we took and provided me with the guidance I needed to make informed decisions. I was impressed by his ability to explain legal concepts in a way that was easy to understand, ensuring that I was an active participant in the process; especially Tesla’s remote diagnosis process to bypass a loophole. His responsiveness and attention to detail instilled a strong sense of confidence in me, which proved vital during this challenging time.

Under David's guidance, we decided to file a lemon law suit with the Attorney General of Washington State. This strategic move opened new possibilities and increased the pressure on Tesla to address my concerns. The Sage Group Law Firm's expertise and relentless advocacy paved the way for a favorable outcome.

I am delighted to share that, thanks to The Sage Group Law Firm, Tesla agreed to repurchase my vehicle. Not only did I regain the full amount of my initial investment, but I was also compensated for the associated interest on the loan. This remarkable resolution would not have been possible without the dedication and tenacity demonstrated by The Sage Group.

The Sage Group Law Firm's commitment to their clients is truly remarkable. They worked tirelessly to protect my rights and fought for the justice I deserved. Their level of professionalism, attention to detail, and depth of knowledge surpassed all my expectations. The team at The Sage Group genuinely cares about the well-being of their clients, and I cannot express enough gratitude for their efforts.

In conclusion, if you find yourself in need of legal assistance, particularly in the realm of consumer law, I wholeheartedly recommend The Sage Group Law Firm. They possess an unwavering commitment to justice, a wealth of expertise, and an unmatched level of client care. With their exceptional support, you can confidently face even the most challenging legal battles.

Thank you, once again, to The Sage Group Law Firm, and especially to David Ruben and Amy Sjolander, for helping me through this arduous journey. Their tireless dedication and unwavering support have made a lasting impact on my life.

reviews.text: It was the first time we'd been in an accident, and they were the worst, worst lawyers I've ever encountered. Several years ago, they handled my car accident case. They sent my husband and me to therapy, and everything seemed fine. But when it came time to give us the check, they left it at the therapy clinic, and what they gave us didn't even cover the car damage. They only gave us about the second half of $20, since there were two of us. And when I called to ask for an explanation, they wouldn't answer. They completely ripped us off. Of course, it was successfully resolved in your favor, and you are responsible for my review. I still had the paperwork and the check stub, which is why I'm writing this review now, because I found the paperwork and saw the name. You'll never admit to the massive theft you committed against us... You were the worst. I hope you've changed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Roxana, my records indicate all aspects of your claim was resolved successfully almost 14 years ago.  I don't know who or what prompted you leave such a review.  Our office always prides itself on customer service and satisfaction.  If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

reviews.text: I do not know where to start and where to end. I have never felt so frustrated in my life. Very unprofessional staff. They tell you I will call you back in 2 hours then 2 hours turns into weeks. All of the staff needs to work on their professional and communication skills. As their client, I had to chase them and keep calling them where I would get no answer. Jack on the other hand is very unprofessional, does not know how to help at all. These people do not understand where they went wrong even though they said they do. I had to ask for my file to be sent to me so I can take it elsewhere. Just for future reference, instead of telling the client to take the case to another law office, try to take the time to listen to them and understand from their point of view. Giving up is easy, but try to protect your clients needs. I have much more to write but I do not think they are worth my time. All I can say is I will never ever give these people business and make sure my friends and families do not as well.
reviews.ownerResponse: Zara, no one gave up on your case. We cherish and respect all our clients. If our clients don't respect our staff or our advice, we suggest they seek alternative counsel.  Your case had serious issues, which I do not want to share publicly, but be assured we were doing everything possible to resolve them, before you asked for your file. You left us with no other choice but to withdraw our representation.

My recommendation to anyone is to run FAR away from Arsine Grun. Arsine was so terrible that I just filed a complaint with the State Bar of California, minutes ago. If there’s any justice, she won’t be permitted to practice law after they review the complaint. For sake of ease, here’s a copy of the complaint I submitted (with certain identifying information having been redacted):

•	Back in April 2022, I notified the City of Los Angeles that there was a dead tree on City property, likely to collapse soon and damage our home or hurt someone.
•	On April 5, 2022, representatives from The City visited the tree, and concluded that it was not a danger, and that they could take up to three years to remove it. Unfortunately, they were mistaken, and the tree did, in fact, collapse, on May 5, 2022, damaging our fence, which would require replacement.
•	At first, I attempted to deal with the Office of the City Attorney. Since I could not find any companies who could offer estimates on repairing the fence, they asked for replacement estimates for the entire fence, which I provided: Estimate 1 ($85,750.00), Estimate 2 ($69,050.00), and Estimate 3 ($53,000.00).
•	Without any rationale or counter-estimate, the Office of the City Attorney offered $3,000.00 for the claim.
•	At this time, in January 2023, I contacted Arsine Grun, attorney. She suggested that she should not bother collecting from the Office of the City Attorney, and should instead attempt to collect from my home insurance company.
•	She provided no update until March 2023, at which time she let me know that she was (a) accepting a $4,749.26 check from my home insurance company (of which she would keep $1,187.31 in legal fees, and forward the remaining $3,561.95 to me) and (b) continuing to pursue my home insurance company for additional money towards the claim.
•	In May 2023, Arsine let me know that my home insurance company was offering an additional $10,000 for the claim, stating that they would only pay for the front fence, and not the rear fence, since the home insurance company viewed the front and rear as separate (and Arsine agreed), and they were only willing to pay for the front. I pointed out to Arsine that one of the previous estimates had indeed itemized the front at $32,775.00, and another of the previous estimates had itemized the front at $24,500.00.
•	Arsine avoided me and ignored my messages for most of June and July 2023.
•	Eventually, in late July 2023, we had a different attorney send an email to Arsine, threatening to report her to the State Bar Association if she continued to ignore me.
•	That prompted a response from her, and she asked me to get a new estimate from another company for just the front part of the fence.
•	I did, and sent it to her on September 19, 2023, Estimate 4: $28,800.00.
•	Since then, despite my repeated follow-ups with her by email, voicemail, and text messages, almost five more months passed, with no update from Arsine, other than a brief text from her on October 10, 2023, in which she wrote, “Hi Sorry I am in a deposition right now, let me call you back by the end of the day.” She did not call me back, and, in fact, she never contacted me ever about the case again, until after I retained a new attorney instead.
•	Eventually, on February 7, 2024, I retained said new attorney, having been completely abandoned by Arsine Grun without any response or explanation.

There is a happy ending here: The new attorney negotiated a $19,500.00 settlement for us inside of one week, but no thanks to Arsine Grun. Stay away from her. You’ve been warned.

I had an incredible experience working with Attorney Khachikyan on my lemon law case for my Tesla. Unlike other manufacturers, which usually resolve lemon cases within 1-2 months, Tesla dragged the process out for over 8 months. Despite the challenges, Attorney Khachikyan never gave up and fought tirelessly on my behalf.

During my two years of ownership, I had to visit the Tesla service center over 30 times due to persistent issues. It was frustrating and overwhelming, but Attorney Khachikyan’s professionalism and dedication gave me peace of mind. He kept me informed every step of the way and was relentless in holding Tesla accountable.

Thanks to his expertise and determination, I finally got the resolution I deserved. I highly recommend Attorney Khachikyan to anyone dealing with a lemon law case—especially if it involves a manufacturer like Tesla that can be difficult to deal with. He’s a true fighter for his clients!

reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Kareem, We do not do workers comp, so do you have the right law firm. reviews.text: Sahak and his Team were very helpful and did a great job with my case. Always on top of things and always answered my calls

Stellar and seamless service. Not to mention diligent, thorough, and highly efficient. If you are ever in need of a Lemon Law Attorney, please consider Sahak and his firm. I promise you will not be disappointed. I’m so grateful I did!

If I could give more than 5 stars I would. Long story short I had purchased a brand new vehicle which turned out to be defective. I had an issue because the vehicle was registered out of state. I looked around and was unable to find any attorneys in that state to help me out and file a lemon law. I contacted many attorneys but nobody was able to help me out with the case. After speaking to my friend, he referred me to Sahak, an amazing individual who from the first second gave me comfort and confidence on my case.  He told me that he would do his best to help me out, and clearly laid out all of my options in front of me. After giving the case to Sahak, within 45 days he was able to do the impossible. He got the manufacturer to accept the defective vehicle, and got me my $135k back. I couldn’t ask for anything more. I heard he also practices different areas of law, so he will be my go to attorney for any legal actions I may need in the future. I would highly recommend him to anyone in need.
Sahak was great from beginning to end. The process was very quick and he did a great job making sure that I was taken care of when my car broke down on me.  Would definitely recommend him!
